generatedFor: Agentic AI Real Estate Sales Platform (demo)

leads.name: Rahul Sharma
leads.intakeRaw: Hi, interested in your Whitefield project I saw on Instagram. Looking at a 3 BHK, budget around 1.2–1.5 Cr, planning in 2-3 months.

objection.text: “Price is slightly high compared to other projects.”
objection.response: I understand 🙂 At ₹9,799/sq ft for a near-ready Whitefield address, Sai Silicon Heights is competitive — and a June 2026 handover saves years of rent-plus-EMI overlap. Only a handful of the 137 3 BHKs remain. Launch benefit: floor-rise waiver + free club membership (₹3.9L value). Shall I block a unit?
objection.offer: Floor-rise waiver + free club membership (₹3.9L value)

followups.text: Thank you for visiting Sai Silicon Heights! 🙏 Sharing your personalised cost sheet & site photos. Let me know your thoughts.
Quick update 🏗️ Finishing works are in full swing for the June 2026 handover. Here’s a walkthrough + a happy-homeowner testimonial.
⏰ Reminder: the launch offer (floor-rise waiver + free club membership) closes this week. Want me to run your EMI numbers?
Hi Rahul, a premium east-facing 3 BHK in Block A just freed up 🌅. Shall I block it, or set up a call with our sales head?

briefing: HOT lead · family of 4 · self-use · budget ₹1.2–1.5 Cr
Top priorities: school + connectivity + clubhouse + gated
Lead project: Sai Silicon Heights (96% match). Backup: GreenVista.
Open objection: price. Anchor on ₹9,799/sq ft + near-ready June 2026 handover.
Active offer: floor-rise waiver + free club membership (₹3.9L value).
Close: offer to block the unit today with a refundable token.

analytics.nextBestAction: Personal call from a senior exec 1 day before the site visit to reinforce the launch offer and pre-empt the price objection.

leads.name: Meera Iyer
leads.intakeRaw: Interested in a 2 BHK in Whitefield for investment / rental. Budget about 1.1–1.3 Cr.

objection.text: “What kind of rental yield and ROI can I expect?”
objection.response: Great question 📈 In Nagondanahalli/Whitefield, 2 BHKs near ITPL rent at ₹28–34k/mo — roughly a 3–3.5% gross yield with strong tech-park tenant demand. A June 2026 handover means rent starts almost immediately, and Whitefield has seen healthy capital appreciation. Want me to share a 5-year ROI projection?
objection.offer: Assured rental-assistance program for the first year

followups.text: Hi Meera 👋 As promised, here’s the 5-year ROI + rental-yield projection for a 2 BHK at Sai Silicon Heights.
📊 Comparable 2 BHKs near ITPL are renting at ₹30k+. Sharing 3 recent rental deals in the micro-market.
⏰ The first-year rental-assistance offer is available on this phase. Shall I set up a quick call with our investment desk?
Hi Meera, a high-floor east 2 BHK (best rental demand) is open. Want me to hold it for you?

briefing: WARM lead · investor · 2 BHK · budget ₹1.1–1.3 Cr · no loan
Priorities: rental yield, resale, tenant demand, low maintenance
Lead project: Sai Silicon Heights 2 BHK (88%). Backup: LakeEdge.
Open question: ROI / rental yield. Anchor on ITPL tenant demand + ~3–3.5% yield.
Active offer: 1st-year rental-assistance program.
Close: book investment-desk call; share 5-year ROI sheet.

analytics.nextBestAction: Send the 5-year ROI + rental-yield projection, then offer a weekend virtual walkthrough and an investment-desk call.

leads.name: Arjun Reddy
leads.intakeRaw: Just saw your ad, exploring options. Maybe a 2/3 BHK, not sure of budget yet, no hurry.

objection.text: “I’m just exploring, and it’s a bit above my budget.”
objection.response: Totally fine — no rush 🙂 If budget is the main thing, our entry 2 BHK (1205 sq ft) starts lower, and I can also share Skyline Orchid which is below ₹1.2 Cr. Shall I keep you posted on price-drop / pre-launch offers and send a quick EMI snapshot so you know where you stand?

visit.slot: Not yet — added to nurture cadence

followups.text: Hi Arjun 👋 No pressure at all — here’s a quick EMI snapshot for the entry 2 BHK so you know the ballpark.
🏠 A couple of budget-friendly options near Whitefield (incl. Skyline Orchid) — sharing in case they fit better.
📣 We just opened a pre-launch price-lock waitlist. Want me to add you so you’re first in line on any offer?
Hi Arjun, checking in — any change in your timeline or budget? Happy to re-share ready-to-move options.

briefing: COLD lead · exploring · 2 BHK · budget ₹90L–1.1 Cr · 6–12 months
Priorities: affordability, ready possession, connectivity
Budget below Sai Silicon Heights band — show entry 2 BHK + Skyline Orchid.
Open objection: budget / just browsing. Keep it low-pressure.
Action: nurture cadence + price-lock waitlist; do NOT hard-sell.
Re-engage on price drops or ready-to-move inventory.

analytics.nextBestAction: Drop into a low-touch nurture cadence; re-engage on a price-drop or ready-to-move alert. Avoid hard-selling now.

leads.name: David Thomas
leads.intakeRaw: NRI based in Dubai. Looking for a 4 BHK in Whitefield for family, budget 2–2.5 Cr. Prefer a virtual tour first.

objection.text: “I’m abroad — how do I handle the visit, paperwork and payments?”
objection.response: We’ve got you covered 🌍 I’ll set up a live video walkthrough at your convenience (GST/IST adjusted), share RERA + legal docs digitally, and our NRI desk handles PoA, NRE/NRO payments and registration end-to-end. SBI/HDFC are approved for NRI home loans too. Shall I book a guided virtual tour this weekend?
objection.offer: Dedicated NRI relationship manager + fully digital documentation

followups.text: Hi David 🙏 Thanks for the virtual tour! Sharing the 4 BHK cost sheet, RERA & legal docs, and our NRI buying guide.
🌍 Your NRI relationship manager (Priya) is assigned. Here’s how PoA + NRE/NRO payments + registration work, step by step.
⏰ The premium-floor 4 BHK you liked is in demand. Want me to block it with a refundable token via secure online payment?
Hi David, shall I set up a call with our legal desk to walk your family through the agreement before you decide?

briefing: HOT NRI lead (Dubai) · 4 BHK · budget ₹2–2.5 Cr · no loan
Priorities: premium spec, virtual buying, legal help, NRI banking
Lead project: Sai Silicon Heights 4 BHK (91%).
Open objection: remote buying logistics. Anchor on NRI desk + digital docs.
Active offer: dedicated NRI RM + end-to-end digital process.
Close: block premium-floor unit with refundable online token after virtual tour.

analytics.nextBestAction: Run the virtual tour, then share the digital booking form + NRI payment plan and assign the NRI relationship manager.

Score each project on location, price-fit, amenity & priority overlap

Recommend 3 BHK · 1425–1505 sq ft

agents.objective: Compose & send the personalised intro message (project summary + brochure + maps + CTA) — the exact outreach the sales team sends, auto-generated.

Fill slots from lead + Project Knowledge (Rahul, Instagram Ad, project facts)

agents.name: Pricing Agent
agents.objective: Compute a transparent all-in cost sheet for ANY unit on demand from the price-list rules: base, amenities, parking, floor rise, GST, registration & EMI.
processingLogic: Target unit: 1505 sq ft · floor 7
Base = sq ft × ₹9,799; add amenities (₹399/sq ft) + parking + floor rise (₹25/sq ft from 5th)
Compute 5% GST and ~6.6% stamp duty & registration
Flat cost ₹1.58 Cr → all-in ₹1.76 Cr
Estimate 80% loan EMI @ 8.6% / 20 yrs (open Output Detail to price any unit live)

whatsappThread.text:
Discover Your Dream Home at *Sai Silicon Heights*! 🏠✨

Hi Rahul, thank you for your interest in our project at Whitefield, Bangalore. We received your inquiry from Digital (Instagram) and look forward to discussing it with you.

An exclusive residential project by *United Developers*.

🏗️ Land Area: 2.38 acres · 206 flats · 2 blocks · B+G+14
🏠 Type: 2 / 3 / 4 BHK, Duplex & Villa Mint
📅 Hand Over: June 2026
✅ Approvals: RERA · BBMP · A-Khatha (CC & OC)
📍 Location: maps.app.goo.gl/NpWwK6eJWWpfFoQF8

Whether it's a dream home or a smart investment, Sai Silicon Heights has it all. 🙏
Hi, interested in your Whitefield project I saw on Instagram. Looking at a 3 BHK, budget around 1.2–1.5 Cr, planning in 2-3 months.

✅ Based on your needs, here’s the best fit:

🏢 3 BHK · 1425–1505 sq ft
💰 ~₹1.76 Cr all-in (incl. GST & registration)
📊 Match score: 96%
📅 Near-ready — handover June 2026
✅ RERA approved

Would you like a free site visit this weekend? 👇
[Book Site Visit] [View Pricing] [Talk to Expert]
Price is slightly high compared to other projects.

I understand 🙂 At ₹9,799/sq ft for a near-ready Whitefield address, Sai Silicon Heights is competitive — and a June 2026 handover saves years of rent-plus-EMI overlap. Only a handful of the 137 3 BHKs remain. Launch benefit: floor-rise waiver + free club membership (₹3.9L value). Shall I block a unit?
🎉 Done! Booked for *Sunday, 29 Jun 2026 · 11:00 AM*. Your host: Priya Nair. You’ll get a calendar invite + reminder. 🏡
